name: Spadamon

signature_move.name: Sugar Pound
signature_move.description: CoversBlue Bladein a blade-shaped blue aura and slashes with it.

description: One of the legendary " Legend-Arms " who, according to legend, "if held by an angel will save the world, and if held by a demon will destroy the world", it is a Weapon Digimon that transforms itself into a weapon. Although its personality is earnest and serious, it has a side that is weak to pressure. Its combat abilities are low, but it shows its true merit once it becomes a weapon.
